bio.es: Ingeniero de Software y consultor, especializado en el ecosistema JavaScript y React. Es conocido por su enfoque pragmático del desarrollo y su capacidad para formar equipos de alto rendimiento, defendiendo la profesionalidad por encima del dogmatismo técnico.
bio.en: Software Engineer and consultant, specialized in the JavaScript and React ecosystem. He is known for his pragmatic approach to development and his ability to build high-performance teams, advocating for professionalism over technical dogmatism.
